title: pterygostemon spathulatus
intro: Pterygostemon spathulatus, also known as Huang Qi or Astragalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Pterygostemon spathulatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve respiratory health. Pterygostemon spathulatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root, capsule, tea, and tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
